zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella d'Aquino於1242年出生在義大利拉其福洛希農艾奎諾時，她的父親IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino16歲，母親Margherita di Svevia12歲。她於1274年9月15日之前與Guglielmo II Stendardo結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1285年在義大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里朱格利亞諾 在 坎帕尼亞享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella d'Aquino于1242年出生在意大利拉其福洛希農艾奎諾时，她的父亲IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino16岁，母亲Margherita di Svevia12岁。她于1274年9月15日之前与Guglielmo II Stendardo结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1285年在意大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里朱格利亞諾 在 坎帕尼亞享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Aquino
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Nicola, Stefano, Gaetano, Margherita, Nunzio, Sal, Salvatore.  Spanish Alba, Jose Alejandro, Pedro, Socorro.

Italian: habitational name for someone from a place called Aquino, of which there are several examples in Italy, but in particular the one in Lazio, birthplace of Saint Thomas Aquinas (see   Aquino  ).

variants.name: Aquino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Antonio, Pedro, Juan, Manuel, Mario, Ana, Jesus, Jorge, Josefina, Julio, Luis.  Portuguese Paulo, Catarina, Joao.  Italian Romeo, Luigi, Salvatore, Clemente, Leonardo.

Italian, Spanish, and Portuguese: from a Christian personal name bestowed in honor of Saint Thomas Aquinas (1225–74; Tommaso d'Aquino in Italian, Tomás de Aquino in Spanish), an Italian Dominican friar and Doctor of the Church. This surname is also common in the Philippines. See also 2 below, compare De Aquino .
Italian: habitational name from a place called Aquino (see   D'Aquino  ), the place where the theologian (see 1 above) was born.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella d'Aquino was born in 1242, in Aquino, Frosinone, Lazio, Italy, her father, IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino, was 16 and her mother, Margherita di Svevia, was 12. She married Guglielmo II Stendardo before 15 September 1274. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1285, in Giugliano in Campania, Naples, Campania, Italy, at the age of 43.

fr.Giugliano in Campania, Napoli, Campania,: Giugliano in Campania, Napoli, Campania, Italie
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella d'Aquino est née en 1242, à Aquino, Frosinone, Lazio, Italie, son père, IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Margherita di Svevia, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Guglielmo II Stendardo avant 15 septembre 1274. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1285, à Giugliano in Campania, Napoli, Campania, Italie, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.Giugliano in Campania, Napoli, Campania,: Giugliano in Campania, Napoli, Campania, Italien
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella d'Aquino 1242 in Aquino, Frosinone, Lazio, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino 16 und ihre Mutter Margherita di Svevia 12. Sie hat vor 15. September 1274 Guglielmo II Stendardo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1285 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Giugliano in Campania, Napoli, Campania, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella d'Aquino è nata il nel 1242 nel Aquino, Frosinone, Lazio, Italia, sua padre, IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Margherita di Svevia, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Guglielmo II Stendardo prima del 15 settembre 1274. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1285, nel Giugliano in Campania, Napoli, Campania, Italia, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella d'Aquinoが1242年にイタリアラズオフロシノンアクイノで生まれた時，父IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquinoは16歳，母Margherita di Sveviaは12歳であった。1274年9月15日以前にGuglielmo II Stendardoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1285年にイタリアカンプアニアナポリギウグリアノ イン カンプアニアで43歳で死去した。

ko.Giugliano in Campania, Napoli, Campania,: 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리 주그리아노 인 캠파니아
ko.lifeSummary: Isabella d'Aquino(이)가 1242년 이탈리아 라지오 프로시넌 아키노에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margherita di Svevia(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1274년 9월 15일 이전 Guglielmo II Stendardo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1285년 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리 주그리아노 인 캠파니아에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella d'Aquino nasceu em 1242, em Aquino, Frosinone, Lazio, Itália, seu pai, IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Margherita di Svevia, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Guglielmo II Stendardo antes 15 de setembro de 1274. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1285, em Giugliano in Campania, Napoli, Campania, Itália, com 43 anos.

ru.Giugliano in Campania, Napoli, Campania,: гюгляно ин кампаня, наполи, кампаня, Италия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella d'Aquino родилась в 1242 г. в местности акуино, фросиноун, лазио, Италия, её отцу по имени IX Conte di Aversa Tommaso Gerardi II d'Aquino было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Margherita di Svevia, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guglielmo II Stendardo перед 15 сентябрь 1274 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1285 г. в местности гюгляно ин кампаня, наполи, кампаня, Италия в возрасте 43 лет.
